CustomField.description: Future Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsFutureCallsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsFutureCallsConsumed__c / LimitsFutureCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.FutureCalls.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsFutureCallsConsumed__c / LimitsFutureCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.FutureCalls.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsFutureCallsConsumed__c / LimitsFutureCallsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsFutureCallsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsFutureCallsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Future Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Future Calls
